title: boerhavia linearifolia subsp. glandulosa
intro: Boerhavia linearifolia subsp. glandulosa, also known as the glandular spade flower, is a type of flowering plant in the four o'clock family (Nyctaginaceae). The plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in wound healing. The health benefits of Boerhavia linearifolia subsp. glandulosa are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
